name: cortex
description: OctoBus package for Cortex observable analysis: analyzer listing, observable submission, and job report retrieval.

TheHive_CORTEX.TheHive_CORTEX/ListAnalyz.name: list-analyzers
TheHive_CORTEX.TheHive_CORTEX/ListAnalyz.description: List Cortex analyzers, optionally filtered by observable type.

TheHive_CORTEX.TheHive_CORTEX/AnalyzeObs.name: analyze-observable
TheHive_CORTEX.TheHive_CORTEX/AnalyzeObs.description: Submit an observable to a Cortex analyzer for analysis.

TheHive_CORTEX.TheHive_CORTEX/GetJobRepo.name: get-job-report
TheHive_CORTEX.TheHive_CORTEX/GetJobRepo.description: Get full analysis report for a completed job.

TheHive_CORTEX.TheHive_CORTEX/GetJobStat.name: get-job-status
TheHive_CORTEX.TheHive_CORTEX/GetJobStat.description: Get status of analysis jobs (single or batch).
